name: NSA GOLD | 20KG
description:
Ballu Art NSA GOLD is a premium-quality cement-based tile adhesive designed for strong and reliable fixing of tiles on floors and walls. It offers excellent bonding strength, durability, and ease of application, making it suitable for both residential and commercial installations.

Engineered for modern construction needs, NSA GOLD ensures secure tile fixing with reduced risk of debonding, cracking, or hollow sound.
features: High bonding strength for long-lasting tile fixing
Better performance than traditional cement mortar

name: Ballu Art SBR | 20L
description:
Ballu Art SBR is a high-quality styrene-butadiene rubber (SBR) latex designed to improve the strength, bonding, and waterproofing properties of cementitious mixes. It enhances adhesion, flexibility, and durability, making it an ideal solution for modern construction and repair works.

The 20-litre pack is suitable for medium to large applications, ensuring consistent performance in both residential and commercial projects.
features: Excellent bonding agent for old-to-new concrete
Easy to mix with cement mortar

name: BALLUART PU | 1KG
description: BALLUART PU is a high-performance polyurethane-based waterproofing and bonding solution designed for superior adhesion, flexibility, and long-lasting protection. It forms a tough, elastic film that effectively seals surfaces against water penetration and environmental damage.
features: High flexibility – resists cracks and surface movement
Easy to apply with brush or roller
Suitable for both interior and exterior applications

name: WHITE CEMENT | 1KG
description:
Ballu Art White Cement is a premium-quality, high-whiteness cement specially designed for decorative and architectural applications. It delivers a smooth finish, superior strength, and excellent durability, making it ideal for modern construction and aesthetic designs.

Engineered with advanced formulation, it ensures bright, consistent color, strong bonding, and long-lasting performance across a wide range of surfaces.
features: Ultra high whiteness for premium decorative finish
Smooth and fine texture for easy application
Ideal base for colored cement and designer finishes

description:

name: DEMPROOF | 1L
description:
DEMPROOF is a high-performance liquid waterproofing compound designed to protect structures from water seepage, dampness, and leakage. It penetrates deep into surfaces and forms a strong, protective barrier that ensures long-lasting waterproofing and durability.

Ideal for both residential and commercial construction, DEMPROOF enhances the life of structures by preventing moisture damage and maintaining surface strength.
features: Strong penetration and bonding with surfaces
Improves durability of concrete and plaster

name: BONDSEAL 2K | 3KG
description:
BONDSEAL 2K (3KG) is a high-performance two-component waterproofing coating designed to provide long-lasting protection against water seepage and dampness. It consists of a liquid polymer (Part A) and a cement-based powder (Part B) that, when mixed, form a flexible, durable, and waterproof membrane.

It is ideal for both internal and external applications, ensuring superior bonding, crack-bridging ability, and resistance to moisture penetration.
features: Strong adhesion to concrete and masonry

name: Ballu Art EPOXY 3 | 1KG
description:
Ballu Art EPOXY 3 PART is a premium-grade three-component epoxy system specially designed for tile joint filling, grouting, and heavy-duty bonding applications. It consists of resin, hardener, and filler, which when mixed together form a highly durable, chemical-resistant, and waterproof compound.

It provides a smooth, glossy finish and superior strength, making it ideal for both decorative and industrial applications.
features: Available in normal and glitter finishes

name: Ballu Art 3 in 1 SBR  | 1L
description:
Ballu Art 3 in 1 SBR is a high-performance styrene-butadiene rubber (SBR) latex specially formulated for repair, bonding, and waterproofing applications. This versatile product acts as a bonding agent, waterproofing additive, and repair modifier, making it an essential solution for durable construction work.

It enhances the strength and flexibility of cement mixes while providing excellent resistance against water penetration and cracks.
features: Improves adhesion to old and new concrete

name: 3 PART EPOXY | 1KG
description:
Ballu Art 3 Part Epoxy – Part A (Resin) is a high-quality component of a three-part epoxy grout system, specially designed for tile joints, floor and wall grouting applications. When used in combination with Part B (Hardener) and Part C (Filler Powder), it forms a strong, durable, and waterproof epoxy compound.

This advanced formulation ensures a smooth satin finish, excellent bonding strength, and long-lasting performance, making it ideal for both decorative and heavy-duty applications.
features: Ideal for premium tile grouting applications
